programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Nearly 41 years after a New York teen's murder, a surprising breakthrough brings new answers.

programme.sub-title: Children Fight Deceased Father's Soulmate!; Email Scam and Slander?
programme.desc: Siblings sue their late father's girlfriend for taxes, attorney fees and the return of his belongings; a jewelry designer says she was the victim of an email scam and unaware that she used a bad check to pay for a car.

programme.title: InvestigateTV+ Weekend
programme.desc: An in-depth look at topics from politics to personal finance, featuring watchdog reports about government corruption and failures, consumer alerts and health care issues.

programme.title: CBS News Sunday Morning
programme.desc: Cuba; singer Kacey Musgraves; artist Jenny Saville; the tale behind the series "Welcome to Wrexham"; a new free online tool that can help keep one's brain healthy; a group trying to save the Venus flytrap; Rep. Jim Clyburn (D-S.C.); a young girl who sees what's possible; people passionate about trees.

programme.title: Face the Nation
programme.desc: Sen. Tim Kaine (D-Va.); Dr. Mehmet Oz, administrator for the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services; Mike Wirth, Chevron CEO; Sir Christian Turner, British ambassador to the U.S.; former Food and Drug Administration commissioner Dr. Scott Gottlieb.

programme.title: Cindy Crawford talks about the latest breakthroughs in skincare
programme.desc: Join Cindy Crawford as she talks to real customers about the breakthrough skincare system that keeps them looking their best. Take a trip to the stunning French countryside to see the rare French melon that defies the aging process.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: PBR Bull Riding
programme.desc: Highlights from April 24 & 25, 2026 in Tacoma, Wash.

programme.title: The Road to Bandon
programme.desc: Narrated by Johnson Wagner, featuring six PGA of America Golf Professionals from across the country as they prepare to compete in the 2026 PGA Professional Championship at Bandon Dunes Golf Resort.

programme.title: All-Access Club Car Championship at the Landings Golf & Athletic Club
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at a week on the Korn Ferry Tour in Savannah, Ga. Follow Barend Botha of South Africa, Carson Bacha of the U.S., and Justin Hastings of the Cayman Islands as they navigate the challenges of trying to reach the PGA TOUR.

programme.title: Live: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: The New Orleans doubles tournament concludes with final-round action at TPC Louisiana. Teams compete in foursomes for the championship trophy and 400 FedExCup points. The field aims to navigate the hazards of this 7,425-yard Pete Dye-designed course.

programme.title: CBS Evening News
programme.desc: Tony Dokoupil shares the day's most important stories, delivering context and depth to bring greater understanding to one's world.

programme.sub-title: Ben Sasse; Disaster Tourists; The Pigeon Mafia
programme.desc: Former Sen. Ben Sasse (R-Fla.); the increasing trend of disaster tourists; elite racing pigeons becoming targets for organized crime.

programme.title: Marshals
programme.desc: With one of their own taken prisoner, the Marshals strategize a risky assault on a paramilitary compound; outmanned, outgunned and with time rapidly running out, Kayce leads the team straight into the fire, risking everything to save their teammate.

programme.desc: As Adam's wife goes in for a C-section to deliver triplets, chaos ensues when their OB-GYN passes out in the operating room; a severe storm detours Watson and Mary's trip to find a renowned doctor to remove Watson's brain tumor.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful
programme.desc: Set in the glamorous world of the Los Angeles fashion scene, this soap opera focuses on the wealthy and powerful Forrester family; its company, Forrester Creations, is the leader in the fashion industry.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Tomas seeks out Vanessa for intel on Lynette; Hayley's inaction where Bill is concerned rubs Naomi the wrong way; Ashley breaks the rules for the greater good; Jacob worries Grayson won't deliver; Lia makes another threat.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Shocking Family Beatdown! Life Insurance Loser?
programme.desc: Video evidence reveals a brutal assault on a man who chided a driver for parking illegally; a man learns that he must pay off his late father's life insurance premiums before collecting on the policy.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Phantom Boyfriend in Malaysia?; Car Fiasco!
programme.desc: A man lends his co-worker $3,000 to help her boyfriend, who goes missing, with the money, soon after; a car bought online gets repossessed.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A license renewal sparks a courtroom collision between former flames; she claims it was a loan meant to be repaid, but he claims it was a gift tied to a rekindling romance.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A woman treats herself to a new hairstyle for the first time in years and is devastated when her hair starts falling out; the stylist says she didn't follow aftercare instructions for the chemical relaxer; they sue each other for emotional distress.
